Policy ID: P001
Policy Name: Comprehensive Health Plan 1

This comprehensive health insurance policy provides financial coverage for hospitalization and medical expenses.

Coverage:
- Covers treatments including hospitalization, surgeries, and listed illnesses.
- Includes pre and post hospitalization expenses up to 30 and 60 days respectively.
- Day-care procedures are covered where hospitalization is not required.

Special Features:

- Includes maternity benefits and newborn coverage.
- Annual health check-ups included.
- Higher room rent limits and no sub-limits on many procedures.

Exclusions:
- Cosmetic treatments and non-medical expenses.
- Self-inflicted injuries.
- Treatments during waiting period for pre-existing diseases.

Waiting Period:
- Pre-existing diseases are covered after a waiting period of up to 2 years.

Claim Process:
- Cashless treatment available at network hospitals.
- Reimbursement available for non-network hospitals with valid documents.

Terms:
- Co-payment may apply depending on policy terms.
- Room rent limits applicable as per policy schedule.
